heading: Step 1: Configure your existing .
body:
- Click **Edit Config** and select
  the cluster you want to modify from the drop-down menu.

- In the dialog box that appears, complete the steps to
  [configure your zones](atlas/tutorial/create-global-cluster).

> **Note:** Atlas doesn't automatically configure or shard collections.
> You can use the Atlas UI to [Atlas UI](de-shard-collection-for-global-writes) if your
> global cluster uses [Atlas-Managed Sharding](atlas/tutorial/create-global-cluster)
> and the collection meets the
> [global write](global-writes-collections).
